query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'calculos' AND (COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%liquido%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%Liquido%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%liq%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%srcc%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%Srcc%') ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user axRHbWZqKReZrAb.b2cf85c9ad94 --database SMgJn6AGQCNfDq7mPzPqc9 --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'calculos' AND (COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%liquido%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%Liquido%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%liq%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%srcc%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%Srcc%') ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
